rows.notes: Consensus on row type and empty amounts. Gpt-5-mini's description 'Sheet. 1900.' matches the image more closely (period included).
Consensus on row type and empty amounts. Gpt-5-mini's description 'Assets.' matches the image more closely (period included).
Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description and amounts are correct. Claude-haiku incorrectly read both the description ('Bank at Aberdeen') and the pounds amount ('57').

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's shillings value '15'. Claude-haiku incorrectly read shillings as '16'. Both extractors correctly identified the description and other amounts. Claude-haiku also misidentified the subsequent subtotal as a secondary marking on this line.

Row added based on visual verification. Gpt-5-mini correctly identified this as a subtotal and transcribed the values (5715 4s 6d + 236 15s 10d = 5952 0s 4d). Claude-haiku missed this row, misinterpreting its value as a secondary marking on the preceding line.

Consensus on description and amounts. Visual verification confirms '3000.' in the pounds column with no shillings or pence. Gpt-5-mini explicitly provided '0' for shillings/pence, which is clearer than an empty string.

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's pounds value '6511'. Claude-haiku misread the pounds as '6071'. Both extractors correctly identified the description, shillings, and pence. Claude-haiku also partially misread the subsequent subtotal as a secondary notation.

Row identified as a subtotal from the image. The written amount is '9571 14 2'. This value is extracted directly from the image, overriding gpt-5-mini's arithmetically derived value of '9511 14s 2d'. Note: The written total (9571 14s 2d) differs from the sum of Furniture (3000 0s 0d) and Investments (6511 14s 2d), which would be 9511 14s 2d. Claude-haiku missed this row entirely.
Consensus across extractors for description, type, and empty amounts. Visually confirmed as a clear header.
Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description 'Rent of Lands' and amounts. Claude-haiku misread the description as 'Bank of Lands'. Gpt-5-mini explicitly provided '0' for shillings/pence.
Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description 'Tithes'. Both extractors correctly read the amounts. Claude-haiku misread the description as 'Leither'.

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description 'Houses on long Leases'. Both extractors correctly read the amounts. Claude-haiku's note indicated uncertainty, but its reading ('Houses on Long Lanes [or] Reversible') was less accurate.
Row included based on visual verification and gpt-5-mini's correct extraction. Claude-haiku missed this row entirely, and misaligned its subsequent rows accordingly.

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description and amounts. Claude-haiku misaligned its descriptions and amounts for this and the preceding row, incorrectly matching amounts for 'Senior Common Room' to a 'Junior Common Room' description, and misreading 'Senior' as 'Junior'.

Consensus across extractors for type and amounts. Arithmetic verification confirms the sum of preceding entries (£134 0s 0d + £224 15s 3d + £53 13s 4d + £1 15s 0d + £70 0s 0d = £484 3s 7d). Description kept empty as per gpt-5-mini for consistency with other subtotals.

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description and amounts. Gpt-5-mini's note for description ambiguity ('How'/'Haw'/'Howe') was excellent. Claude-haiku had a significantly incorrect description ('New Endowment (Isabel)') and pounds amount ('181'), though shillings and pence were correct.

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description 'Mitchell'. Both extractors correctly read the amounts. Claude-haiku's note indicated uncertainty, but its reading ('[Isabel or continuation]') was incorrect.

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description 'Loscombe Richards Fund'. Both extractors correctly read the amounts. Gpt-5-mini's note correctly identified ambiguity in the cursive description and provided a well-reasoned choice; claude-haiku's reading ('Locombe Reduction Fund') was less accurate.

Consensus across extractors for type and amounts. Arithmetic verification confirms the sum of preceding entries (£18 10s 11d + £16 14s 0d + £19 12s 7d = £54 17s 6d). Description kept empty as per gpt-5-mini for consistency with other subtotals.

rows.description: I certify that the accounts of the College are duly
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's transcription of the first line of the attestation paragraph. Claude-haiku merged multiple attestation lines into one and had a minor transcription error ('Certify' instead of 'I certify').

rows.description: kept in proper books of account & that the Abstracts
rows.notes: Row added based on visual verification. Gpt-5-mini correctly transcribed this second line of the attestation paragraph. Claude-haiku merged this line into a larger block, missing its distinct presentation.

rows.description: and Balance Sheet contain a full & true account
rows.notes: Row added based on visual verification. Gpt-5-mini correctly transcribed this third line of the attestation paragraph. Claude-haiku merged this line into a larger block and had a transcription error ('Balances' instead of 'Abstracts').

rows.description: of the financial condition of the College.
rows.notes: Row added based on visual verification. Gpt-5-mini correctly transcribed this fourth line of the attestation paragraph. Claude-haiku merged this line into a larger block.
Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's transcription 'March 8th 1901' (including 'th') and 'header' type. Claude-haiku missed the 'th' and incorrectly classified it as an 'entry'.

Visual verification, acknowledging the highly stylized handwriting, leans towards gpt-5-mini's transcription 'W.C. Tackstad F.C.O.' as more plausible than claude-haiku's 'W. C. Huxford'. Gpt-5-mini's note accurately reflects the low confidence due to ambiguity. Type 'header' is appropriate for a signature line.

Visual verification confirms this is an extremely difficult and faded signature. Gpt-5-mini's reading 'Jackson Ridley Browning' is a more plausible interpretation of the cursive than claude-haiku's '[Watson-Picky?, Proving Auditors?]'. Gpt-5-mini's note accurately describes the high uncertainty and illegible suffix. Type 'header' is appropriate.

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's amounts and description, including the '£' symbol. Claude-haiku significantly misread the pounds amount as '1602' (missing two zeros). Note: the grand total written on the page (£16002 15s 7d) does not arithmetically reconcile with the sum of the preceding subtotals (£16062 15s 7d) by a difference of £60, but the instruction is to extract what is written.
